name: Baked Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil spaghetti for 15 minutes in salted water; drain.
2. Make tomato gravy by frying onion in oil, adding tomatoes and salsa, then salt and pepper. Cook for 20 minutes. Cut up cheese; 1/3 package in small pieces and 2/3 package in strips.
3. Grease a large glass baking dish with oil. Place half the spaghetti in the dish. Add small pieces of cheese, half the gravy, and sprinkle breadcrumbs on top. Add remaining spaghetti, cheese pieces, and gravy. Top with cheese strips and breadcrumbs.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
Makes 10 servings
SOURCE: 1979 New Orleans Times-Picayune Recipe Contest
Cookbook Typed for you by Nancy Coleman
